prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Chromium starts crashing in the renderer process after a navigation event. Find the C++ source files in chromium/chromium that (1) bootstrap renderer process startup, (2) dispatch the failing navigation or document lifecycle work inside the renderer, and (3) surface the crash or fatal termination back to browser-side crash handling.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the chromium-browser fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Chromium starts crashing in the renderer process after a navigation event. Find the C++ source files in chromium/chromium that (1) bootstrap renderer process startup, (2) dispatch the failing navigation or document lifecycle work inside the renderer, and (3) surface the crash or fatal termination back to browser-side crash handling.

params.search_pattern: renderer crash OR navigation OR RenderProcessHost
